title: DataQualityReportBatchRequest
description: Request to run multiple data quality report aggregations in a single call.

dataQualityReportRequest.description: A single data quality report aggregation to execute as part of a batch.

key.description: Client provided key used to correlate this request with its result in the response.

q.description: Search query to filter the aggregation results.

index.description: Index to perform the aggregation against.

aggregationQuery.description: Aggregation query to perform aggregation on the search results.

domain.description: Filter by domain fully qualified name.

requests.description: List of data quality report aggregations to execute concurrently.
